# beta-tiktok Research — 2026-07-07

Fresh items fetched: 35 (window: last 14 days)

## CRITICAL
(none)

## ACTIONABLE
- [13 Trending Songs on TikTok in July 2026 (+ How to Use Them)](https://buffer.com/resources/trending-songs-tiktok/) - This provides a current list of viral sounds that could boost Aydins' content visibility and engagement if used promptly. **Action:** Review the list and test incorporating 1-2 trending, brand-appropriate songs into the next week's automated Reels pipeline.
- [TikTok Adds Three New AI Video Generation Tools to Its Symphony Ad Toolkit](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiogFBVV95cUxOLV9oVzM5a3RwSUFlbFhrUXpNaUJuX3ItbmQ2LXQyaE5aT1pfTVg2M0xUbGFzRjFVaF9GV3VrNkhMa09JR0JyeGx3cktfaEdsdnY4T3JkdC1QSjVEU29TTlhLOUtUSTQ2M0RzVEU3S2E3WHZNMzdLOWF1SW1MSkY0ZTJBN051SXlMNHo4X25UbTBfbUg0VVB3bktiMVlOMTBtQVE) - New AI ad tools could streamline creative production for Smart+ campaigns and improve ad performance. **Action:** Explore the new Symphony AI tools within the TikTok Ads Manager to assess if they can speed up ad creative iteration for jewelry promotions.

## INFORMATIONAL
- [How TikTok’s algorithm is affecting you, from the content you see to what you can do to regain control - EL PAÍS English](https://news.google.) - This recent analysis (July 1) offers insights into user perception and potential control over the FYP algorithm, which is core to Aydins' reach. **Action:** Monitor for any user-led behavior shifts that could affect content performance, but no immediate platform change requires action.
- [TikTok cuts trust and safety jobs in Singapore for second straight year](https://news.google.) - This indicates ongoing internal shifts at TikTok that could indirectly impact platform stability or policy enforcement. **Action:** File as a watch item for any future impacts on content moderation or support responsiveness, but no direct action needed now.
- [Helping Brands Move From Culture to Action: TikTok Unveils New Creative Solutions at Cannes Lions](https://news.google.) - Highlights TikTok's ongoing push for more effective ad formats and brand tools, relevant for Aydins' paid strategy. **Action:** Note the strategic direction; consider if future "Creative Solutions" launches could benefit campaign planning.

## IRRELEVANT
*Items 1-12, 14-20, 22-35 are classified as IRRELEVANT. They are either off-topic (general social media management, Instagram, LinkedIn, buying followers), refer to events outside the US/regulatory focus (Indonesia fee delays, Singapore layoffs, Malaysia shipping rebates), are about other platforms (Microsoft Performance Max), or are stale evergreen guides (social media calendars, strategy templates for 2026). The staleness heuristics also apply to articles about buying followers, which is a perennial topic, not new news.*

**Executive Summary:**
Out of 35 items, only 5 were relevant to the specified TikTok business focus. No **CRITICAL** items requiring immediate action were found. Two **ACTIONABLE** items were identified: leveraging July 2026's trending TikTok songs and exploring newly launched AI ad tools. Three **INFORMATIONAL** pieces provide context on algorithm discussions, internal TikTok changes, and ad product direction. The remaining 30 items were rejected as stale, off-topic, or not pertaining to the tracked US-centric business concerns.
